sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Looking at the image, the green dot has moved from [32,8]-[33,9] to [32,18]-[33,19] (inside the dark red box area). It moved 10 columns right (5 RIGHT actions × 2 columns each).
The green dot is now at [32,18]-[33,19], which is inside the dark red box at [30,18]-[33,21].
Let me check the segmentation to confirm.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check green dot position
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        b = n['boundary']
        r1, c1 = min(p[0] for p in b), min(p[1] for p in b)
        r2, c2 = max(p[0] for p in b), max(p[1] for p in b)
        print(f"Green dot: id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, px={n['pixels']}, bbox=[{r1},{c1}]-[{r2},{c2}]")

# Check all left-side objects
print("\n=== Left-side objects ===")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    b = n['boundary']
    r1, c1 = min(p[0] for p in b), min(p[1] for p in b)
    r2, c2 = max(p[0] for p in b), max(p[1] for p in b)
    if c2 < 32 and n['pixels'] > 4:
        print(f"  id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, px={n['pixels']}, bbox=[{r1},{c1}]-[{r2},{c2}]")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.content:
The green dot is now at [32,18]-[33,19], inside the dark red box at [30,18]-[33,21]. The dark red box now has px=12 (was 16), which means the green dot is overlapping with it or inside it.
Looking at the left-side objects:
- Gray box at [18,22]-[23,27] (id=6, px=32) - with yellow dot inside
- Gray box at [30,8]-[33,11] (id=22, px=16)
- Red bar at [30,12]-[33,17] (id=23, px=24)
- Dark red box at [30,18]-[33,21] (id=24, px=12) - green dot is inside
- Blue block at [34,8]-[37,11] (id=27, px=16)
- Gray box at [38,8]-[43,13] (id=30, px=36) - this is the original gray box that the green dot was in
Wait, the gray box at [38,8]-[43,13] is back! It has px=36, which is larger than before (was 32). Maybe it absorbed some cells.
The green dot is now at [32,18]-[33,19], which is inside the dark red box. The dark red box has px=12, which is less than 16, so the green dot is overlapping with it.
Now I need to continue moving the green dot toward the divider. The divider is at col 32-33, so the green dot needs to move RIGHT from col 18-19 to col 32-33.
But wait, the green dot is at [32,18]-[33,19], and the divider is at col 32-33. The green dot needs to move RIGHT by about 7 more columns to reach the divider.
